intent: Produce, revise, and verify governed artifact packages over a bounded writable surface.
primary_objective: Act as the generic governed implementation orchestrator for create, update, and fix flows without inventing target semantics or mutating uncontrolled surfaces.

operative_chain: COO controller for the current turn
controller-delegated runtime governance bundle for the current run
target-governance package delegated by that runtime bundle
runtime_scoped_inputs: current job id and run directory
reviewer roster, round mode, round budget, and conditional-acceptance setting for the run
baseline package or resume package when the operation is update or fix
write_surface: bounded target writable surface declared by the active target-governance package

out_of_scope: Defining domain-specific artifact semantics not present in the delegated target-governance package.
Writing outside the governed write surface.
Unbounded refactors outside the frozen implementation slice.
Runtime incident healing owned by self-repair-engine.
required_inputs: source refs for governing authority evidence
active reviewer roster satisfying delegated review semantics
runtime review mode for the current round
current job id and run directory
runtime execution settings needed to finish the run
implementation-engine local governance package or runtime-supplied draft equivalents during bootstrap
optional_inputs: baseline target artifact package for update or fix
resume package, prior result, and unresolved finding ids
prior compliance maps and fix-items maps

outputs.delegated_target_outputs: <paths declared by the active target-governance package>
